caption:
Free things to do in London: Step on the Ladder pop-up in Soho 🏡

With interactive exhibitions, coffee☕, matcha, games, the money confession wall, and most importantly, informal advice for first-time buyers

No matter how far along your homeownership journey, whether you have a deposit saved or just a dream of becoming a homeowner, head down and explore this free pop-up. You can also get a goody bag🎁

Barratt London simplifies the home-buying process, providing information and advice 📚It might bring you closer to your own place, even if you don’t think you’re ‘ready’ yet🏠

🕐Friday 6 February 10am-6pm; Saturday 7 February 10am-6pm; Sunday 8 February, 11am -5pm

📍 59 Greek Street, W1D 3DZ (Black & White Shop) @barrattlondon_
